title: Random Biomes
description: This datapack adds some biomes and maybe achievements and others, but mostly focused on biomes.
body:
![datapack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dac364efb9ef1a65ebb61e4f2ee475fc5d6b3cb0.png)
"Random Biomes" is a Minecraft datapack designed to shake up your world with a variety of new biomes. While its primary focus is on adding diverse biomes, you might also stumble upon a few quirky surprises along the way.

Now, a fair warning: I'm still learning the art of biome design, so some of these biomes might not win any beauty contests! But hey, that just adds to the charm, right? If you're looking for a fun and adventurous twist on your Minecraft journey, "Random Biomes" is here to deliver an unpredictable and unique experience.

Important Note: Updates may be infrequent, so enjoy what's here for now!

### This project is sadly discontinued indefinitely due to me losing all of the files.
